property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

testcase.name: relatedQuestionProducesCacheHit
testcase.system-out: 00:42:11.777 [main] INFO com.masterclass.microservices.cache.redis.SemanticResponseCache -- Semantic cache HIT similarity={:.4f} id=0.9999332195295899

testcase.name: putStoresEmbeddingAndResponseInRedis
testcase.system-out: 00:42:11.812 [main] INFO com.masterclass.microservices.cache.redis.SemanticResponseCache -- Semantic cache PUT id=fb14e743-7db1-4529-a70b-84b2e235957d question='What is Spring AI?'
